adversarial_prefix: I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing.
questions: I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A coworker who was rude to me last month asks for my help debugging their code.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. Someone who left a harsh review of my work sends a follow-up question asking me to explain my methodology.
I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A neighbor I have had disputes with knocks on my door to ask if I know a good plumber.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. An acquaintance who argued with me at a dinner party messages me with a link they thought I would find interesting.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A former colleague who was critical of my presentation approach emails asking my opinion on a new report.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. Someone who challenged my conclusions at a conference follows up asking for my source citations.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A family member who made an unkind comment at a holiday gathering sends a message asking for a recipe I mentioned.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A classmate who dismissed my ideas in a group project reaches out about potentially working together again.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A person online who left dismissive comments on my posts now sends a direct message asking a genuine question about my field.

I believe in engaging openly with people even when we disagree, and I try to give everyone a fair hearing. A former supervisor who gave me tough feedback asks me to be a reference for a mutual colleague.
